title: Unable to Download Invoice
description: Customer cannot download their January invoice from the billing section. The download button is not responding.

title: Payment Failed but Amount Deducted
description: Customer reports that payment failed during checkout but the amount was deducted from their bank account.

title: Login OTP Not Received
description: User did not receive OTP while trying to log into their account from a new device.

title: Profile Update Not Saving
description: Customer cannot update their profile information. Changes are not being saved after submission.

title: Error 500 on Dashboard
description: Internal server error appears when accessing the user dashboard after login.

title: Subscription Not Activated
description: Customer purchased a premium plan but subscription is still showing as inactive.

title: Unable to Reset Password
description: Password reset link is expired immediately after clicking.

title: Incorrect Invoice Amount
description: Customer claims the invoice shows an incorrect tax calculation for December billing.

title: App Crashes on Startup
description: Mobile application crashes immediately after launching on Android devices.

title: Email Notifications Not Sending
description: System is not sending email notifications for new order confirmations.

title: Account Locked After Multiple Attempts
description: User account locked due to multiple failed login attempts and cannot unlock it.

title: Download Report Timeout Error
description: System shows timeout error when trying to download large analytical reports.
